semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, brick buildings, scaffolding on the right, and moderate traffic.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth temporal progression; vehicles move continuously without jumps or flickering. Scene structure remains stable.
logical.object_continuity: Objects maintain consistent presence and position relative to ego vehicle over time. No sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road layout, building facades, and infrastructure remain geometrically consistent throughout frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward steadily within its lane, maintaining safe distance from surrounding traffic.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions observed. Traffic flow appears orderly and predictable.

logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though some exhibit subtle shape deformation or edge drift not seen in real footage.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall scene geometry is preserved, but local distortions occur around moving vehicles and complex structures like scaffolding.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with apparent steady motion, though visual artifacts may affect perception accuracy.
